description_long: This is a large, rectangular outdoor trash bin with a slightly sloped, flat lid and a robust, utilitarian design. The body of the bin is dark, likely made from heavy-duty plastic or metal, and features a prominent hazardous waste warning symbol on its side, indicating it is intended for special waste management. Two sturdy wheels are attached at the rear base, allowing for easy tilting and rolling, while the front and sides are smooth and unadorned. The lid appears to be a single, solid piece that can be lifted manually, with no visible pedal or automatic mechanism. There are no visible handles on the front or sides, suggesting any handle may be integrated into the rear or lid. The overall appearance is functional and suited for urban environments such as streets, parks, or industrial areas.
description: A large, dark-colored outdoor trash bin with a sloped flat lid, hazardous waste symbol, and two rear wheels for mobility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat, slightly overhanging lid and plain, smooth front panel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the hazardous waste symbol and one of the two large wheels at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both wheels and the full height of the bin, with no visible handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the hazardous waste symbol and the second wheel.
